title: Account Executive (Campaigns)
description:
At Confirm Good, we create viral content and impactful campaigns that brands love. As an Account & Partnerships Executive, you’ll be the go-to person connecting our clients with our creative team. You’ll drive partnerships, manage campaigns, and make sure every collaboration is a win-win.

This role is perfect for someone who’s organised, people-oriented, and excited about building strong relationships while actively contributing to revenue growth through sales.

What You’ll Do:

  • Be the main point of contact for clients, keeping communication smooth and relationships strong.
  • Build partnerships with businesses, PR teams, and agencies — helping them see the power of working with us.
  • Coordinate media invites, events, sponsorships and campaign drops like a pro.
  • Keep track of campaign performance, create reports, and suggest ideas to make the next one even better.
  • Create proposals and pitch decks to wow clients with our ideas.
  • Oversee timelines, creative production, and ensure every campaign is delivered on point.
  • Jump in on fun projects, brainstorm sessions, and ad-hoc campaigns with the team.
  • Actively pitch, upsell, and cross-sell our suite of media products to meet sales targets.

Who You Are:

  • A natural communicator who’s confident, positive, and loves connecting with people.
  • Organised, detail-oriented, and thrives under deadlines.
  • A self-starter with a growth mindset, eager to close deals and build lasting partnerships.
  • Team player who actively fosters a harmonious, collaborative, and supportive work culture.
  • Motivated by targets and loves celebrating wins with the team


Fresh grads or candidates (without experience) who are confident they will excel in this role are welcome to apply through our Graduate/Trainee Program.

postedCompany.description:
Confirm Good is a Singapore-based media publishing platform that brings the latest deals, news and happenings to locals in our little red dot.


We offer first-hand information on deals and promotions on a daily basis and we curate and pick out the best deals for our subscribers. We are the first Telegram channel in Singapore to have exclusive partnerships with well-loved brands such as Krispy Kreme, Llao Llao, LiHO, and Tiger Sugar to offer our subscribers giveaways, one-for-one deals, and many other promotions and discounts!


We are expanding to bring our tight-knit community even closer by adding a more personal touch to our offerings through Confirm Good with not only a wider variety of partnerships, but also with articles covering various topics to appeal to a wider demographic.


With well-researched insights and advice spanning a wide range of topics, we seek to deliver simple to understand and beneficial contents for our readers.


We are always on a lookout for talents and we can offer you a broad range of exciting careers of your choice.


To qualify for a full-time position with us, we would prefer it if you have at least 2 years of working experience in a relevant field or if you can impress us with your work. 


If you are really keen to try your hand at something new and don’t have the experience, you can apply for our 6-month Internship Program.


We look forward to hearing from you :)


Don’t worry, Confirm Good Lah!
postedCompany.name: CONFIRM GOOD PTE. LTD.
